title: KDNA Cluster Manifest
description: Defines a composable group of KDNA packages that work together as a judgment system.

purpose.description: What complex domain task this cluster addresses.

packages.description: KDNA packages that form this cluster.

use_when.description: Keywords or conditions that trigger this package.

composition_rules.description: Rules governing how packages in this cluster interact.

routing_questions.description: Questions that help the router select the right primary and advisors.
